notes: Packet 1 remediation: previous #460 approval gate state is no longer live APPLY authority.
Future APPLY approval requires hardened out-of-band Human Owner evidence; raw approved_by_human=true is not sufficient.
HMAC key material must come from the Human Owner environment only and must never be tracked or printed.
Gate authorizes only the exact heartbeat-only DRY_RUN proof harness protected PR lane.
This gate does not authorize scheduler activation, armed supervisor behavior, worker launch, live sends, broker/OANDA/live trading/webhook/credential behavior, broad APPLY, or GitHub workflow edits.
This gate does not implement the heartbeat harness.
Commit requires clean validation and an exact-file commit package.
No live trading, broker, OANDA, API key, webhook, or real order action is allowed.
